rejected_draft.rationale: I am correcting the junction to satisfy the 'smooth_hub' contract requirement which mandates 'fillet' blend mode. To address the previous FreeCAD geometry failure, I have increased the max_hub_radius to 15mm and the outlet lengths to 25mm (ensuring length > max_hub_radius) to provide more space for the fillet surfaces. I have also increased the blend radii to create a smoother, less congested intersection.

deterministic_recommendations.instruction: Keep the junction/target/goals fixed. Select a different authored fillet radius only when the Intent permits it; if a smooth hub is not immutable, hard blend_mode is an admissible topology change. Repeating outlet length or max_hub_radius cannot repair an unsuitable seam.
